name: SKELETON_TARGET__MEMBER_LOOKUP__ASSIGNEE__ALL_TIME
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering assignees constrained by target.
cypher_template:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10
examples: Which assignees filed patents involving IL2?
Which assignees filed patents involving GPA33?
Which assignees filed patents involving FZD4?
